name: ai-project-framework
description: Portable, cross-session, cross-AI project management. Keeps durable per-project context files in cloud storage (Dropbox-first; also Box, Google Drive, local) so project state survives across Claude surfaces and other AIs. v0.1 ships the project-context-sync skill: propose-then-approve session load and close reconcile, real-time updates, in-place edits with an append-only changelog and a clobber guard. Composes with domain packs and dev-session-protocol.
